Key.English: Strategic Military Placement at Military Objectives
Key.Chinesesimp: 军事目标的战略军事部署

Key.English: Spawns random field camps in flat open terrain within the TAOR, spaced at the specified minimum distance (metres). Use to add unpredictable forward operating bases beyond fixed military objectives.

Restricts placement to objectives inside this marker (or markers). Enter the marker name exactly as placed in the editor. Multiple markers: separate with a comma, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. marker1,marker2. Leave blank to use the entire map.

Excludes objectives inside this marker (or markers) from placement. Enter the marker name exactly as placed in the editor. Multiple markers: separate with a comma, no spaces, no quotes — e.g. marker1,marker2.
Filter objectives less than selected size
Key.Chinesesimp: 筛选小于选定大小的目标
只有巨大和较小的目标

Key.English: Filter objectives less than selected priority
Key.Chinesesimp: 筛选低于选定优先级的目标

Key.English: The proportion of the force that will be actively on duty and patrolling at mission start. Lower values leave more units in reserve.
Key.Chinesesimp: 执勤和巡逻的部队数量

Key.English: Place Units: spawns both units and registers objectives. Objectives Only: registers objectives for an AI Commander without placing any units — useful when OPCOM manages forces separately.
Total number of virtual unit slots to fill across all objectives. Distributed proportionally between objectives based on their size and priority.
Preferred composition of the force. Weighted towards the selected type but not exclusive — other unit types will still appear in smaller numbers.
Override the calculated infantry group count. Enter a whole number. Leave blank to use the calculated value from Force Size and Weighting. Set to 0 to spawn no infantry groups.
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置要生成的步兵组的自定义计数

Key.English: Override the calculated motorised group count. Enter a whole number. Leave blank to use the calculated value from Force Size and Weighting. Set to 0 to spawn no motorised groups.
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置要生成的摩托化组的自定义计数

Key.English: Override the calculated mechanised group count. Enter a whole number. Leave blank to use the calculated value from Force Size and Weighting. Set to 0 to spawn no mechanised groups.
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置要生成的机械化组的自定义计数

Key.English: Override the calculated armour group count. Enter a whole number. Leave blank to use the calculated value from Force Size and Weighting. Set to 0 to spawn no armour groups.
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置要生成的装甲组的自定义计数

Key.English: Override the calculated spec ops group count. Enter a whole number. Leave blank to use the calculated value from Force Size and Weighting. Set to 0 to spawn no spec ops groups.
Key.Chinesesimp: 设置要生成的支援组的自定义计数

Key.English: The faction whose unit roster this module will draw from. Enter a single faction classname — e.g. OPF_F. For multiple factions on the same side use the Override Factions field on the synced AI Commander instead.
Selects a suitable HQ building near the module and garrisons it. Also marks the location as highest priority for the AI Commander.
Key.Chinesesimp: 选择靠近模块的总部目标

Key.English: Places a Field HQ composition (tents, vehicles) near the module in flat terrain. Supplements the main HQ as a forward command post.
Spawns helicopters and fixed-wing aircraft at helipads and hangars within military objectives. Requires suitable landing infrastructure to exist at objectives.
Key.Chinesesimp: 将空中单位放置在目标中

Key.English: Places faction-appropriate supply boxes inside storage buildings at objectives. Does not affect the AI logistics system — for AI resupply use the Military Logistics module.
Spawns parked vehicles at objectives to add visual density. These are uncrewed and static — they do not patrol or respond to combat.
Key.Chinesesimp: 将周围车辆放置在适当位置

Key.English: Number of infantry groups assigned to garrison and patrol buildings within each objective. Has no effect if no infantry groups are spawned.
Radius in metres within which garrison groups search for enterable buildings to occupy. Increase for large spread-out objectives.
Key.Chinesesimp: 搜索可进入建筑物的径向范围(米)

Key.English: Percentage of garrison groups that will actively patrol between buildings rather than remaining static. Higher values create more visible activity but increase CPU load.
Key.Chinesesimp: 在警戒半径内巡逻建筑物的单位百分比

Key.English: SQF code executed each time a unit from this module spawns. _this = [unit, profileID, side, faction]. Runs server-side in a scheduled thread. To affect all clients use remoteExec or publicVariable. hint and player commands will have no effect. Example: _this params ["_unit"]; ["fnc_mySetup", _unit] remoteExec ["BIS_fnc_call"];
Yes: the SQF hook runs only on the first spawn of each unit profile — useful for one-time setup like adding event handlers. No: runs every time the profile re-spawns after being virtual.

Place the Military Placement module in the editor, select the desired Size, Weighting and Faction from the drop down. Custom factions can be entered in the text box (separated by a comma). These will overwrite the default factions in the drop down.
Key.Chinesesimp: 将军事布局模块置于编辑器中,从下拉列表中选择所需的大小、权重和派别。可以在文本框中输入自定义派别（用逗号分隔）。这些将覆盖下拉列表中的默认派别
